title: Crispy Filipino Orange Crumble
description: A fresh and light crumbly dish featuring crispy fried oranges in a paleo-friendly recipe that is perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Cut each orange into slices, keeping skin and flesh separated as they will be fried separately.
In a small bowl, mix coconut oil with pinch of sea salt if using. Heat enough oil in a deep fryer or large pot to reach 350°F (175°C).
When the oil reaches temperature, add orange slices skin side down first and then flesh side up. Fry for about 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Drain excess grease from fried skin and flesh separately on paper towels.
Combine fried orange skin pieces in a bowl with any additional ingredients or seasonings if desired.
